buttons.primary: bg-[#5D6E5E] text-white hover:bg-[#4A584B] rounded-sm px-8 py-4 uppercase tracking-widest text-xs transition-all duration-300 ease-out hover:shadow-lg
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent border border-[#5D6E5E] text-[#5D6E5E] hover:bg-[#5D6E5E] hover:text-white rounded-sm px-8 py-4 uppercase tracking-widest text-xs transition-all duration-300
buttons.ghost: text-[#5D6E5E] hover:text-[#4A584B] hover:bg-[#5D6E5E]/5 uppercase tracking-widest text-xs

cards.product: group relative bg-white p-4 md:p-8 border border-transparent hover:border-[#5D6E5E]/20 transition-all duration-500 ease-out

inputs.default: bg-transparent border-b border-[#5D6E5E]/30 focus:border-[#5D6E5E] rounded-none px-0 py-4 placeholder:text-[#5D6E5E]/40 focus:ring-0 transition-colors

layout_strategies.alignment: Asymmetrical balance - offset text against large imagery

motion.page_transition: initial={{ opacity: 0, y: 20 }} animate={{ opacity: 1, y: 0 }} exit={{ opacity: 0, y: -20 }} transition={{ duration: 0.6, ease: [0.22, 1, 0.36, 1] }}

instructions_to_main_agent: Use 'Playfair Display' for all Headings (h1-h3). Do not use Inter.
Implement the 'Bento Grid' for the Shop page - do not use a standard uniform grid.
Use the 'Sage Green' (#5D6E5E) as the primary brand color, but keep backgrounds 'Warm Alabaster' (#F9F8F6).
Ensure all buttons are uppercase with wide tracking (tracking-widest).
For the 'Accessories' section, use the lifestyle images if specific product images are missing.
The 'Care Guide' should be a rich text page with large typography and 'lifestyle' images.
Use 'lucide-react' for icons, styled with the Gold Accent color (#D4AF37).
universal_guidelines: Do not use generic centered layouts.
Create depth through layered design elements.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable.
All interactive elements MUST include data-testid attributes.
